products.title: Living Room Furniture
products.description: Modern sofas, coffee tables, TV units and storage designed for comfort and local style.
products.highlight: Custom sofa sets, modular cabinets, and end-to-end living room design.

products.title: Bedroom Furniture
products.description: Elegant beds, wardrobes, and nightstands tailored for restful, stylish spaces.
products.highlight: Premium wood finishes, mattress-friendly frames, and fitted storage.

products.title: Dining & Kitchen
products.description: Dining sets, chairs, and kitchen cabinets built for family gatherings and local craftsmanship.
products.highlight: Durable dining tables, benches, and custom kitchen units.

products.title: Office & Custom Furniture
products.description: Functional workstations, shelves, and made-to-order furniture solutions for home and business.
products.highlight: Smart storage, ergonomic desks, and tailor-made showroom projects.
